documentation.text:
@title H2OFeeCollector
 @notice Cobra una comisión fija en H2O por transacción (stake/unstake/claim/sub/mining buy).
         La comisión se paga vía Permit2 SignatureTransfer (sin approve previo).
         El monto por defecto es 1 H2O y es ajustable por el owner.
         Conectado a:
           - H2O staking (stake / unstake / claimRewards / claimRef / claimOwnerVip)
           - H2O staking V2 (stake / unstake / claim)
           - Multi-staking (todos los tokens)
           - VIP subscription (buyVIP)
           - Mining UTH2 (buyPackage / claimRewards)
           - Mining WLD (buyPackage / claimPackageRewards / claimAllRewards)
           - Mining TIME (stake / unstake / claimWldReward)
         NOT conectado al swap.

actual."}},"title":"H2OFeeCollector","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"payFee(((address,uint256),uint256,uint256),bytes)":{"notice":"Llamado por el frontend como primera tx del batch antes de la acci\u00f3n real."}},"notice":"Cobra una comisi\u00f3n fija en H2O por transacci\u00f3n (stake/unstake/claim/sub/mining buy).         La comisi\u00f3n se paga v\u00eda Permit2 SignatureTransfer (sin approve previo).         El monto por defecto es 1 H2O y es ajustable por el owner.         Conectado a:           - H2O staking (stake / unstake / claimRewards / claimRef / claimOwnerVip)           - H2O staking V2 (stake / unstake / claim)           - Multi-staking (todos los tokens)           - VIP subscription (buyVIP)           - Mining UTH2 (buyPackage / claimRewards)           - Mining WLD (buyPackage / claimPackageRewards / claimAllRewards)           - Mining TIME (stake / unstake / claimWldReward)         NOT conectado al swap.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"contracts/H2OFeeCollector.sol":"H2OFeeCollector"},"evmVersion":"paris","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"contracts/H2OFeeCollector.sol":{"keccak256":"0x1ab2cbbfea6e38ce1e3eb4464ce46992c7ffb1f00ed32cc7fd13481b68384bee","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://930c13dbbdc5cff39b99f04e76b500a9086d2109d0331f75a87b9c0be113ab13","dweb:/ipfs/QmSKriYzyshV3yjGe9mzDeV7xt4kj4DnJhFQAB1HjRigxK"]},"contracts/IPermit2.sol":{"keccak256":"0x3da4a132791b5cf75011bc3b9c10d6fd4d9036f346aa45d15933228e58ad8db8","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://92a745214a0c1f5577f3198abc3b65ae3bbc9214760116adf313ed40c084d009","dweb:/ipfs/QmQPPTXvHBRaAqnCV6PGhzmjjK2s3XEY6G4DrgyvFmhP3y"]}},"version":1}
